originalTitle: Iraola bowing out in style - where will he go next?
originalDescription: Any suggestion of distraction following Andoni Iraola's decision to leave Bournemouth was firmly dismissed by his players in their statement victory against Newcastle.

originalTitle: Leading Dunfermline to final 'up there with anything' for Lennon
originalDescription: Dunfermline's penalty shootout victory over Falkirk on Saturday means they await the winners of Sunday's second semi-final between Celtic and St Mirren.

originalTitle: Bromley promoted to League One for first time
originalDescription: Bromley are promoted to League One for the first time in the club's history after Notts County's defeat by Barnet.

originalTitle: £111 train tickets will have 'chilling effect' on World Cup - Fifa
originalDescription: Fifa hits back at criticism from New Jersey Governor Mikie Sherrill, saying vastly inflated train fares at the 2026 World Cup will have a "chilling effect".

originalTitle: 'The writing's on the wall' - Edwards accepts relegation
originalDescription: Wolves manager Rob Edwards says "the writing's on the wall" for his side as they edge closer to relegation following a 3-0 defeat to Leeds.

originalTitle: Bournemouth running 'that extra yard harder' for departing Iraola - Tavernier
originalDescription: Bournemouth midfielder Marcus Tavernier tells the Final Score team that Cherries boss Andoni Iraola's impending departure makes them want to work even harder for him.
Newcastle manager Eddie Howe says he is 'hurt' to hear the fans voice their frustrations following their 2-1 defeat to Bournemouth at St. James' Park.

originalTitle: I knew news of my departure would not rock players - Iraola
originalDescription: Bournemouth manager Andoni Iraola says he trusts his players to continue playing hard despite the recent news of his departure at the end of the season, as they beat Newcastle 2-1 at St. James' Park.

originalTitle: Bromley promoted to League One for first time in their history
originalDescription: Bromley have been promoted to League One for the first time in their history with two games of the season to spare.

originalTitle: Heartbreak for Spurs! Rutter capitalises on Danso error with superb late leveller!
originalDescription: Georginio Rutter scores a late leveller for Brighton in their Premier League clash with Tottenham.

originalTitle: 'Unstoppable, majestic!' - Simons' wonder strike puts Spurs back in front!
originalDescription: Xavi Simons put Tottenham back in front with a brilliant strike in their Premier League clash with Brighton.

originalTitle: 'What a goal!' - Mitoma's STUNNING volley brings Brighton level before the break!
originalDescription: Kaoru Mitoma's exquisite volley brings Brighton level in their Premier League clash with Tottenham.

originalTitle: Big moment for Spurs! Porro header opens scoring
originalDescription: Pedro Porro opens the scoring for Tottenham in their Premier League clash with Brighton.

originalTitle: Alparslan sinks Zavateri and Albert Einstein in Greenham
originalDescription: Alparslan emerged as a genuine contender for the 2000 Guineas when denting some lofty reputations in the Watership Down Stud Too Darn Hot Greenham Stakes at Newbury.

originalTitle: Toure hat-trick steers Norwich past Bristol City
originalDescription: Mohamed Toure netted a second-half hat-trick as Norwich came from behind to beat Roy Hodgson's Bristol City 4-2 in a mid-table Championship battle at Ashton Gate.
